name: lycheemem-openclaw
description: Thin OpenClaw adapter for LycheeMem structured memory. Keeps memory-core intact and exposes long-term retrieval, optional retrieval compression, and background consolidation without replacing the built-in memory owner.

LYCHEEMEM_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the local LycheeMem service.

tools.name: lychee_memory_search
tools.description: Retrieve structured long-term memory from LycheeMem. Use it for historical facts, entity relationships, long-running project context, and procedural memory recall. The returned graph_results are synthesizer-ready richer structures rather than flat fact lists.

top_k.description: Maximum results per source before synthesis.

tools.name: lychee_memory_synthesize
tools.description: Compress and fuse the structured retrieval results from lychee_memory_search into a shorter background_context. Use it when the retrieved memory payload is too verbose to inject directly into the main OpenClaw context.

user_query.description: The current user request used for relevance scoring.

tools.name: lychee_memory_consolidate
tools.description: Persist new long-term knowledge into LycheeMem at the end of a conversation. Use after a turn produced meaningful new facts, entities, preferences, relationships, or reusable skills.

retrieved_context.description: Compressed background_context from the current turn for novelty detection.
